title: MISO LMP Real Time 5 Min Final
description:
Final Five-minute real-time ExPost LMPs for each Pnode in MISO, includes energy, loss, and
congestion components. 

This data updates on Mondays and is provided by MISO on a weekly basis for the week prior to the previous week. 

This dataset includes the location types:
- *Gennode*
-  *Hub*
-  *Interface*
-  *Loadzone*

For more information see the MISO Pricing Reports Guide (PDF): [https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Real-Time Preliminary Market LMPs_MISO Pricing Reports Readers Guide.pdf](https://misodocs.blob.core.windows.net/marketreports/Real-Time%20Preliminary%20Market%20LMPs_MISO%20Pricing%20Reports%20Readers%20Guide.pdf)
